channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Kickstarter Opens For MMORPG Hollowed Oath, from Former Heroes Journey Devs, Which Lets You Mix Up To Three Classes
item.content:encoded:
A new multiclass MMORPG has entered the ring, as Hollowed Oath by upstart studio God Mode Games has launched its Kickstarter today. 

In Hallowed Oath, players explore and try to mend the world of Orrathis, “where a mysterious force known as the Hollow distorts reality,” as the Kickstarter explains. “The gods have vanished and civilization clings to survival behind wards, houses, and relics as twisted creatures, rival factions, and echoes of a forgotten past threaten what remains.” 

The game's dev team includes former members behind The Heroes Journey, a private EverQuest server which shut down last fall after a lawsuit filed by Daybreak Game Company. (The team later came to a settlement with Daybreak). Looks like they're starting anew, but they've clearly gotten old-school MMORPG experience.

At the core of the gameplay is a multi-class system, where players can choose from up to three of classes and their abilities to tap into the best of each and optimize their gameplay style through a “synergy” system. The official website has a list of sixteen classes up so far, with a mix-and-match combination tool that lets players see how the stats work out together. 

Hollowed Oath also has a heavy mix-and-match hero selection system that similarly allows you to choose active and passive traits, plus stats, powers, and perks to optimize what build you’re going for. On top of this, the Kickstarter shows off some already-established lore, instanced dungeons and more spread out over ten planned, distinct lands. 

It does have an AI use page that claims that generative AI is used for prototyping and early creative concepts, with some assets made trained on in-house models. 

At the time of writing, Hollowed Oath has over $35,000 of a $100,000 goal shown on the Kickstarter campaign page on its first day.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/kickstarter-opens-for-mmorpg-hollowed-oath-from-former-heroes-journey-devs-which-lets-you-mix-up-to-three-classes-2000137989
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: DC Universe Online's Second Patrol of 2026, Fearful Day, is Live
item.content:encoded:
DC Universe Online’s second Patrol of 2026, Fearful Day, is live today. The new content is the second of four Patrols that can get you Campaign 2026 Mega rewards.

Fearful Day begins the battle for Mogo, and runs through June 1st. Amon Sur is invading Mogo with an army of Qwardians and Yellow Lanterns. You can work to stop these forces from overwhelming the planet By teaming up with other Lantern Corps members to fight back and protect the living planet.

There are three daily open-world missions to take on: Refugees in Crisis, Qwardian Sabotage, and Cleansing Crystals. On top of this are three weekly open-world challenges: Bounty: Arkillo, Assault on Fear, and Bounty: Hank Henshaw. 

There's also instanced content to take on in the form of a new Solo, Hidden Lantern Village, new Alert, Protecting Mogo, and a Raid, Defending Mogo. It's from those titles, you can begin to guess what awaits within. 

Now, about those rewards. All versions of the queued content will give credit on all difficulties. 

You could add the Hardlight Crash Out Elite Uplink Device (Unlimited) to your collection. This targets multiple enemies with an elite orbital strike from Guy Gardner. When you unleash this, When you unleash this, targets with high health take extra damage, for a helpful bonus. 

Other rewards include a Skill Point Token per character and several possible rewards you can claim once per account, like 30k Ally Favor, 150 Stabilizer Fragments, and Source Marks.

If you missed the first Patrol of the year, you can opt for a buyout if you want to stay in the running for the Campaign rewards. Buyouts are also available for this second Patrol, with a price that’s prorated depending on how much you complete yourself first.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/dc-universe-onlines-second-patrol-of-2026-fearful-day-is-live-2000137988
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
